heading: Required Access
body:
To push logs to an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket, you must have
[Project Owner](<Project Owner>) or [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access to
Atlas.

To push logs to an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket using the Atlas Administration API, you
must have [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to Atlas.
